info.title: PowerFlex Manager (AsmManager) REST API
info.description: Describes the API calls for PowerFlex Manager.

put.description: Set up volumes and datastores from all gateways and vCenters found in the inventory.
Update the inventory for a given gateway or vCenter.

delete.description: Delete the inventory for a given gateway or vCenter.

get.description: Retrieve a filted list of volumes.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Required filter. Must include at least gateway and vcenter: (gatewayId eq "scaleio-100.68.85.82") or (vcenterId eq "vcenter-100.68.77.215")

Search Operators: eq (equals), ne (not equal), ge (greater than equal), le (less than equal), gt (greater than), lt (less than), like, ilike, sw (starts with), ew (ends with), in, empty, notempty, null, notnull

Search Controls: and, or, not: (gatewayId eq "scaleio-100.68.85.82") or (vcenterId not eq "vcenter-100.68.77.215")

Searching for Strings should use " delimiter around the String. Searching for "in" should be a comma separated list of values.

Filtered result is supported on children- datastores, sdcs 

Example of parent level filter:  ((gatewayId eq "scaleio-100.68.85.82") and (name like "test-HC-vol")) 

Example of child level filter:  (sdcs.ipAddress eq "10.125.78.20")

get.description: Retrieve avolume by its ID.
Retrieve a numbered list of volumes based on filter and count.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of instances to retrieve

get.description: Retrieve filtered list of volumes.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Required filter. Must include at least vcenter ID: (vcenterId eq vcenter-100.68.77.215). Also all columns from Datastore are available i.e. name, id etc.

Search Operators: eq (equals), ne (not equal), ge (greater than equal), le (less than equal), gt (greater than), lt (less than), like, ilike, sw (starts with), ew (ends with), in, empty, notempty, null, notnull, and, or, not 

example of parent level filter:  (vcenterId eq vcenter-100.68.1.1) and (datacenterId eq datacenter-2) and (name eq datastore-1) 

 example of child level filter:  (volume.sizeInKb gt 16)

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Valid sort columns are the same as in Datastore: name, id, etc

get.description: Retrieve a volume by its ID.
Retrieve a numbered list of datastores based on filter and count.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of instances to retrieve

parameters.description: Flag should not be used and is specified for internal processing only

parameters.description: Flag for if response will be used editing the template component

put.description: Update a service template component.

get.summary: Retrieve filtered list of service template components
get.description: Retrieve a filtered list of service template components.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Required filter. Should include at least serviceTemplate.templateId: (serviceTemplate.templateId eq "c52859c9-96d3-40ec-9b4a-bc0612a272cb")

Search Operators: eq (equals), ne (not equal), ge (greater than equal), le (less than equal), gt (greater than), lt (less than), like, ilike, sw (starts with), ew (ends with), in, empty, notempty, null, notnull

Search Controls: and, or, not: (name like "component-") and (name not ew "-local")

Searching for Strings should use " delimiter around the String. Searching for "in" should be a comma separated list of values.

Filtered result is supported on children- serviceTemplate, resources, parameters 

Example of parent level filter:  ((id eq "bf794626-b5d1-4538-9c42-5a91032ae397") and (cloned eq true))

Example of child level filter:  (parameters.value like "vcenter")

parameters.description:

Supported Filter Operators: eq (equals), like, co (Contains)

examples: 1. eq,draft,false

2. co,name,SO

get.description: Retrieve a filtered list of deployments.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Search Operators: eq (equals), ne (not equal), ge (greater than equal), le (less than equal), gt (greater than), lt (less than), like, ilike, sw (starts with), ew (ends with), in, empty, notempty, null, notnull

Search Controls: and, or, not: (name like "CO-") and (name not ew "-nodes")

Searching for Strings should use " delimiter around the String. Searching for "in" should be a comma separated list of values.

Filtered result is supported on children- serviceTemplate, components, resources, parameters. 

Example of parent level filter:  ((id eq "bf794626-b5d1-4538-9c42-5a91032ae397") and (allUsersAllowed ne false))

Example of child level filter:  (deployedDevices.serviceTag like "JZ63")

get.description: Retrieve a filtered list of service templates.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Search Operators: eq (equals), ne (not equal), ge (greater than equal), le (less than equal), gt (greater than), lt (less than), like, ilike, sw (starts with), ew (ends with), in, empty, notempty, null, notnull

Search Controls: and, or, not: (name like "component-") and (name not ew "-local")

Searching for Strings should use " delimiter around the String. Searching for "in" should be a comma separated list of values.

Filtered result is supported on children- detailedMessages, assignedUserList, firmwareRepositoryEntity, softwareLicenseRepositoryEntity, deployment, components

example of parent level filter:  (id eq "bf794626-b5d1-4538-9c42-5a91032ae397")

example of child level filter:  (deployments.id eq "bf794626-b5d1-4538-9c42-5a91032ae397")

get.summary: Retrieve filtered list of managed devices
get.description: Retrieve a filtered list of managed devices.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Search Operators: eq (equals), ne (not equal), ge (greater than equal), le (less than equal), gt (greater than), lt (less than), like, ilike, sw (starts with), ew (ends with), in, empty, notempty, null, notnull

Search Controls: and, or, not: (displayName like "server-") and (displayName not ew "-XFJ")

Searching for Strings should use " delimiter around the String. Searching for "in" should be a comma separated list of values.

Filtered result is supported on children- deviceGroupList, deviceLastJobList, deployments 

Example of parent level filter:  (refId eq "vcenter-cluster1")

Example of child level filter:  (deployments.id eq "bf794626-b5d1-4538-9c42-5a91032ae397")
